title: astragalus coarctatus
intro: Astragalus coarctatus, also known as the narrow-leaved milk-vetch or narrow-leaved milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant in the legume family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus coarctatus include enhancing immune function, reducing fatigue, and relieving stress and anxiety, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, flu, and other respiratory infections. Astragalus coarctatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
